title: Russia's businesses under strain from Ukraine's attacks on Wildberries
summary_full: Ukrainian drones have hit several retail warehouses belonging to Russia's biggest online retailer Wildberries in a matter of days.
summary_public: Ukrainian drones have hit several retail warehouses belonging to Russia's biggest online retailer Wildberries in a matter of days.

RU.label: positive
RU.evidence: Russia's businesses under strain from Ukraine's attacks
